title: Liliastrum bulbuliferum
intro: Liliastrum bulbuliferum, also known as the Bulbiferum Lilyturf, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The health benefits of Liliastrum bulbuliferum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Liliastrum bulbuliferum is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and digestive issues.

The order Asparagales is further divided into several families, including Iridaceae, Asparagaceae, and Agapanthaceae.
